repomix_software.name: Academix_v13.2_VBA_Modules
repomix_software.summary: Pure VBA Decision Support System for stock management. Zero external dependencies -- no Python, no Flask, no JSON files, no APIs, no internet calls. Everything runs locally inside Excel.

sheet.name: ARTICLES
sheet.desc: Master catalog -- 12 items, protected by MASTER_PWD

sheet.name: MOUVEMENTS
sheet.desc: Core transaction ledger -- all stock IN/OUT (protected)

sheet.name: STAGING_BUFFER
sheet.desc: Local staging for batch ops (replaces staging_buffer.json)

sheet.name: RECEIPT_TAG
sheet.desc: Receipt tag with local verification code

sheet.name: TEMPLATE_BON
sheet.desc: Generic form template for PDF export

module.name: MAIN_MACROS.bas
module.desc: Entry point -- AjouterMouvement() shows frmStockEntry

modules.module: Public Sub AjouterMouvement() frmStockEntry.Show End Sub

module.name: mod_Config.bas
module.desc: Centralized constants -- sheet names, passwords, version, logistics params

modules.module: Public Const SYS_TITLE As String = "ERP Academie" Public Const SHEET_MOUVEMENTS As String = "MOUVEMENTS" Public Const SHEET_ARTICLES As String = "ARTICLES" Public Const SHEET_SYS_STRINGS As String = "SYS_STRINGS" Public Const SHEET_AUDIT_LOG As String = "AUDIT_LOG" Public Const SHEET_STAGING As String = "STAGING" Public Const MASTER_PWD As String = "erp_secure_pwd_2026" Public Const WORKING_DAYS_PER_YEAR As Integer = 250 Public Const OBSERVATION_DAYS As Integer = 38 Public Const VERSION As String = "v13.2"

module.name: mod_StockEngine.bas
module.desc: Core stock calcs -- EOQ, ROP, CMUP, ABC classification, safety stock

modules.module:
KEY FUNCTIONS: - GetSafetyStock(SKU): ART-001=200, ART-005=10, ART-002=50, ART-003=20, default=50 - ComputeEOQ(annualDemand, unitPrice): Q* = SQRT(2*D*S/(P*t)) - ComputeROP(avgDailyDemand, SKU, leadTimeDays): ROP = (avgDaily * LT) + SS - ValidateStockLevel(SKU, currentStock, annualDemand, unitPrice): MsgBox alert if stock <= ROP - UpdateArticleStockBalance(artCode, mvtSign, qty): Updates ARTICLES sheet stock column - GetAnnualDemandFromHistory(SKU): SumIfs from MOUVEMENTS for current year OUT - CalculateCMUP(SKU): Weighted average cost from MOUVEMENTS IN values - RefreshAllCMUP(): Recalculates CMUP for all articles - UpdateAllABCClassifications(): ABC by consumption value (A=80%, B=15%, C=5%)
CONSTANTS: ORDER_COST_S=500 DZD, HOLDING_RATE=0.2 (20%), LEAD_TIME_DEFAULT=2 days

module.name: mod_StockEntry_Logic.bas
module.desc: Stock entry form logic -- 8 guard chain, grid ops, Enregistrer, Auto-Ref

modules.module:
CANONICAL CONSTANTS: CANON_ROP=205.6, CANON_SS=200, CANON_QSTAR=176, CANON_LT=2
SECTIONS: 0. Module-level constants & state (m_TotalGeneral, m_CurrentArticle, m_StockActuel, m_IsBRMode) 1. Form Initialize -- SetupFormAppearance, PopulateDropdowns, LoadArticleComboBox, ConfigureGrid, ResetToDefaultState 2. Document Type Banner -- cmbTypeDoc_Change (BS=orange, BR=green, DA=blue), GetDocPrefix 3. Article Selection -- cmbArticle_Change, EvaluateStockStatus (RUPTURE/CRITIQUE/ALERTE/OK), cmbCategorie_Change 4. Quantity Field -- txtQuantite_Change (color-coded: red<0, yellow<=SS, light-yellow<=ROP, green>ROP) 5. Auto Reference -- GenerateAutoRef (prefix-DDMM-seq), GetNextSequence 6. Grid Operations -- btnAjouterLigne_Click (8 guards), btnSupprimerLigne_Click, UpdateTotalDisplay 7. Enregistrer -- btnEnregistrer_Click: validates, writes via mod_Database.SecureWriteTransaction, fires mod_SyncBridge.SyncTransactionInternal, logs audit trail, offers PDF export 8. Utilities -- GetArticleField, IsValidDate 9. Cancel -- btnAnnuler_Click, QueryClose interceptor
GUARD CHAIN (in btnAjouterLigne_Click): 1. Valid date (DD/MM/YYYY) 2. RefDoc non-empty (mandatory) 3. Article selected 4. Article exists in catalog (m_StockActuel != -1) 5. Qty is numeric and > 0 6. BR mode: PU required and > 0 7. OUT mode: netProjected >= 0 (stock check) 8. OUT mode: ROP alert confirmation if netProjected <= ROP
SAVE FLOW (btnEnregistrer_Click): - Validate grid has rows, service selected, doc type selected - Validate each grid row (qty>0, pu numeric) - For each row: write via mod_Database.SecureWriteTransaction - Fire mod_SyncBridge.SyncTransactionInternal (updates stock, recalculates CMUP, triggers ROP alert) - Rollback on sync failure (delete rows written in this session) - Log via mod_AuditTrail.LogTransaction - Sync metrics via mod_SyncBridge.SyncMetricsFromLedger - Offer PDF export via mod_ExportEngine.ExportTransactionToPDF

module.name: mod_Dashboard.bas
module.desc: Dashboard rendering -- KPIs, critical table, ABC-XYZ summary

modules.module: MAIN: RefreshDashboard() -- entry point - UpdateKPIs: Total Articles, Rupture count, Alert count, Total Stock Value - UpdateCriticalTable: Top 5 items closest to rupture (red shading for Rupture) - UpdateABCXYZSummary: Count of A, B, C class articles HELPER: GetOrCreateDashboardSheet -- creates DASHBOARD sheet if missing

module.name: mod_Database.bas
module.desc: Secure write layer -- SecureWriteTransaction to MOUVEMENTS sheet

modules.module: SecureWriteTransaction(docDate, typeSign, refDoc, codeArticle, designation, quantity, unitPrice, lineValue, thirdParty, optional notes): - Unprotects MOUVEMENTS sheet - Writes to next available row (cols 1-9, 12) - Re-protects sheet - Error handler ensures re-protect even on failure - Disables ScreenUpdating, Calculation, Events during write

module.name: mod_SyncBridge.bas
module.desc: Internal sheet sync -- replaces Python bridge, local-only

modules.module:
SyncTransactionInternal(artCode, mvtType, qty, unitPrice, refDoc): 1. Update physical stock via mod_StockEngine.UpdateArticleStockBalance 2. Recalculate CMUP via mod_StockEngine.CalculateCMUP, update ARTICLES col H 3. Trigger stock validation via mod_StockEngine.ValidateStockLevel Returns 0 on success, -1 on error
SyncMetricsFromLedger(): Recalculates all CMUPs + ABC classifications GetMetricFromLedger(artCode, metricName): Returns cmup or abc_class from ARTICLES GetStockFromLedger(artCode): Returns stock from ARTICLES col C GetSkuMetrics(artCode): Returns "ABC-XYZ|countdown" string

module.name: mod_AuditTrail.bas
module.desc: Audit logging -- append-only to AUDIT_LOG sheet

modules.module: LogTransaction(ActionType, RefNum): Logs date, time, USERNAME, action, ref to AUDIT_LOG ClearAuditLogs(): Admin-only with confirmation prompt

module.name: mod_ExportEngine_v13_2.bas
module.desc: PDF export engine -- PopulateTemplateBon, ExportTransactionToPDF, ExportToExcel, ExportDashboardPDF

modules.module:
ExportTransactionToPDF(docRef): 1. Validates TEMPLATE_BON and MOUVEMENTS sheets exist 2. PopulateTemplateBon(docRef) -- builds complete Bon layout from MOUVEMENTS data 3. Exports to PDF on desktop: docRef_yyyy-mm-dd.pdf
PopulateTemplateBon(docRef, wsMouv, wsTpl): - Dynamic column discovery via FindColumn (immune to column-order changes) - Fallback to hardcoded positions if headers missing - Builds: Ministry header, Direction (bilingual FR/AR), document title banner, metadata row, article table (6 cols, alternating shading), total row, signature zone (2-col), footer - Arabic designation lookup from ARTICLES sheet - Returns True if data found, False otherwise
FindColumn(ws, headerName): Searches row 1 for header, returns column number SafeNumericVal(v): Returns 0 for empty/non-numeric cells SheetExists(sheetName): Checks if sheet exists
ExportToExcel(sheetName): Exports sheet to .xlsx on desktop ExportDashboardPDF(): Exports DASHBOARD sheet to PDF

module.name: mod_ReceiptTag.bas
module.desc: Receipt tag generation -- offline verification code, PDF export

modules.module:
GenerateReceiptTagPDF(): - Reads selected row from MOUVEMENTS - Generates local verification code via GenerateLocalVerifyCode (deterministic, no internet) - Populates RECEIPT_TAG template sheet - Exports to PDF in receipt_tags/ folder
GenerateLocalVerifyCode(receiptID, mvtDate, artCode, qty, mvtType): - Builds raw string from all fields - Generates checksum via character code summation with modular arithmetic - Returns formatted: V-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX (12 alphanumeric hex chars)
SetupReceiptTagSheet(): Creates RECEIPT_TAG sheet with bilingual layout (FR/AR), named ranges, A5 paper size

module.name: mod_Localization.bas
module.desc: FR/AR bilingual strings -- GetLocalizedString, UnicodeMsgBox via MessageBoxW API

modules.module: GetLocalizedString(stringID): Looks up Arabic text from SYS_STRINGS sheet by STRING_ID SafeGetTxt(strID): Compatibility wrapper for GetLocalizedString ShowLocalizedMessage(stringID, msgType, title): Shows localized MsgBox in Arabic UnicodeMsgBox(msg, msgType, title): Wrapper for Windows API MessageBoxW (StrPtr for Unicode)

module.name: mod_Analysis.bas
module.desc: ABC-XYZ analysis -- UpdateABC_Classification, calls mod_SyncBridge.SyncMetricsFromLedger

module.name: mod_Procurement.bas
module.desc: Procurement docs -- GenerateOrderReport, GenerateDA, GenerateBC, supplier evaluation

module.name: mod_Reports.bas
module.desc: Report aggregation -- GenerateStockReport, GenerateMovementReport

module.name: mod_Navigation.bas
module.desc: Sheet navigation -- OpenStockForm

module.name: mod_UI_Setup.bas
module.desc: UI initialization -- SetupAllSheets, ApplyFormatting

module.name: mod_SheetSetup.bas
module.desc: Sheet creation/protection -- SetupProtectedSheet, ApplyDataValidation

module.name: mod_Utilities.bas
module.desc: General utilities -- IsValidDate, FormatCurrency, CreateFolder

module.name: mod_Backup.bas
module.desc: Workbook backup -- BackupProjectCode exports all VBA components

module.name: mod_Restore.bas
module.desc: Backup restore -- RestoreFromBackup, VerifyBackup

module.name: mod_LogViewer.bas
module.desc: Log viewing -- GetLastLogEntries

module.name: mod_ExportEngine.bas
module.desc: Legacy export engine (superseded by mod_ExportEngine_v13_2.bas)

userforms.form:
CONTROLS: - txtDate: Date input (DD/MM/YYYY) - cmbArticle: Article selection (filtered by category) - cmbTypeDoc: Document type (BS/BR/DA) - cmbService: Service/Fournisseur dropdown - cmbCategorie: Category filter (Toutes/Fournitures Bureau/Informatique/Admin/Inconnu) - txtRefDoc: Document reference (auto-generated or manual) - txtQuantite: Quantity input (color-coded feedback) - txtPrixUnitaire: Unit price (enabled for BR, auto-filled for BS) - lstGrid: 6-column grid (Code, Designation, Categorie, Qte, PU, Valeur) - fraDocTypeBanner: Color-coded banner (BS=orange, BR=green, DA=blue) - lblBannerText: Banner text - lblStockInfo: Stock status display (OK/ALERTE/CRITIQUE/RUPTURE) - lblWilsonAlert: Wilson EOQ display (ART-001 only: Q*=176, SS=200) - lblTotalGeneral: Running total - lblGridHeader: Grid column header - lblPU: PU label - btnAjouterLigne: Add line to grid (triggers 8-guard chain) - btnSupprimerLigne: Remove selected line - btnEnregistrer: Save all grid rows to MOUVEMENTS - btnAutoRef: Auto-generate reference - btnAnnuler: Cancel and close - chkSyncInternal: Internal sync toggle (default=True)
EVENTS: All handled by mod_StockEntry_Logic.bas - UserForm_Initialize -> InitializeForm() - cmbTypeDoc_Change -> cmbTypeDoc_Change() - cmbArticle_Change -> cmbArticle_Change() - cmbCategorie_Change -> cmbCategorie_Change() - txtQuantite_Change -> txtQuantite_Change() - btnAjouterLigne.Click -> btnAjouterLigne_Click() - btnSupprimerLigne.Click -> btnSupprimerLigne_Click() - btnEnregistrer.Click -> btnEnregistrer_Click() - btnAutoRef.Click -> GenerateAutoRef() - btnAnnuler.Click -> btnAnnuler_Click() - QueryClose -> intercepts X button, calls btnAnnuler_Click

form.name: frmSystemLog.frm
form.desc: System log viewer -- lstLogEntries, cmbFilter, btnRefresh

layer.name: UI Layer
layer.desc: User interaction, form rendering, sheet navigation

layer.name: Logic Layer
layer.desc: Business logic, guard chains, dashboard updates, analysis

layer.name: Engine Layer
layer.desc: EOQ/ROP/CMUP calculations, sync orchestration, PDF export

layer.name: Tag Layer
layer.desc: Receipt tag generation with offline verification codes

step.desc: Form initializes: populates dropdowns, loads articles from ARTICLES sheet
User selects document type (BS/BR/DA) -- banner color changes
User selects article -- EvaluateStockStatus shows stock level + ROP/SS status
User enters qty -- txtQuantite_Change shows color-coded projection
User clicks Ajouter Ligne -- 8-guard chain validates, adds to grid
User clicks Enregistrer -- iterates grid rows:
For each row: mod_Database.SecureWriteTransaction writes to MOUVEMENTS
mod_SyncBridge.SyncTransactionInternal: updates stock, recalculates CMUP, checks ROP
On sync failure: rollback (delete rows written in this session)
